blocks.text: By visiting this Website, registering an account, or interacting with any of our services, you expressly acknowledge and agree to the terms outlined in this Disclaimer.
1. Purely for Entertainment Purposes
Our Platform delivers a digital card game experience. Nothing displayed on the Website or within the game software should be interpreted as:

items: Investment or financial guidance
Legal or professional consultation
Regulated gambling, sports betting, or wagering services

blocks.text: All virtual match outcomes, rank adjustments, and card drop mechanics exist strictly for personal amusement within an isolated entertainment environment.
2. No Real-World Economic Value
All digital card packs, internal virtual cards, gift drops, and profile wallet balances used on this Platform:

items: Are purely simulated utility assets confined to our ecosystem.
Possess zero real-world currency value, fiat equivalent, or monetary value.
Do not constitute financial instruments, tradeable securities, commodities, or investment assets.
Are not cryptocurrencies, tokens, or digital collectibles (NFTs).
Do not establish any transferable property or ownership rights outside of our specific Platform interface.

blocks.text: Any virtual asset values or marketplace prices are determined purely within the local game ecosystem and are subject to immediate adjustment or rebalancing by our team at any time.
3. Exclusion of Guarantees
We provide no warranties, promises, or assurances regarding:

items: Gameplay Outcomes: Your win/loss ratios, competitive placements, or strategy effectiveness.
Randomized Content: The exact card rarities, foil variants, or specific attributes found within opened digital card packs or reward crates.
Secondary Liquidity: Your ability to flip, trade, or offload digital cards through our internal systems, or any future player demand for those specific items.

blocks.text: You assume full personal and financial risk for every purchase, pack opening, and gameplay choice you make.
4. Internal Marketplace Limitations
If the Platform enables a peer-to-peer virtual card trading hub or internal shop:

items: We act solely as the technical provider of the digital environment.
We do not guarantee that your listed items will find a buyer.
We do not guarantee asset value retention or stable secondary pricing.
We reserve the total right to freeze, cancel, alter, or remove listings to preserve market health.

blocks.text: 5. Transaction & Payout Processing
All checkout payments and balance withdrawals are processed and managed by third-party financial institutions and payment gateways.

items: We are not liable for core banking network blackouts, processing delays, or external network failures.
We make no promise of 100% uninterrupted checkout availability.

A withdrawal request is never guaranteed to go through automatically. We reserve the right to audit, delay, or deny payouts to comply with anti-fraud screenings, risk metrics, or payment processor rules.

blocks.text: 6. Allocation of Risk & Technical Boundaries
6.1 User Accountability

You are exclusively responsible for your account actions. We will not be held liable for internal inventory dissatisfaction, perceived loss of virtual value, user-to-user trading mistakes, or psychological dissatisfaction stemming from game outcomes.
6.2 "As-Is" Service Standard
The Platform is provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" framework. We explicitly disclaim any guarantee that:

items: The servers will remain uninterrupted, operational, or online at all times.
The software code will be totally free of bugs, server latency, glitches, or exploits.
Technical errors will not accidentally impact active matches, player inventories, or transaction updates.

blocks.text: 7. Third-Party Vendor Dependency

Our infrastructure depends on external networks (including web hosting firms, server databases, and payment processors). We do not assume responsibility or liability for third-party server outages, data delays, or service cancellations outside of our immediate corporate control.
8. Compliance & Jurisdiction Boundaries
We manage this Platform in accordance with our regional legal regulations and payment industry guidelines.

User Compliance Responsibility: It is your sole responsibility to verify that accessing an online digital card game and interacting with a peer-to-peer virtual marketplace is fully legal under the laws of your local jurisdiction. We reserve the absolute right to terminate access or block connections from specific geographical regions to maintain legal compliance.
9. Revisions & Updates

We may update this Legal Disclaimer periodically to adjust for platform modifications or legislative updates. Your continued interaction with the game or platform after a revision implies full acceptance of the updated terms.
